overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a foggy medieval European city with stone architecture, waterfront promenades, and garden terraces. The character ascends stairs, traverses elevated walkways, enters a manor house, and emerges into a sunlit alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with historic stone buildings

events.description: begins ascending curved stone staircase to upper terrace level

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade then climbing stone stairs to reach an upper terrace

notable_agents.action: man in yellow shirt running ahead along the path

entered.detail: multi-story stone building with arched windows and wooden balconies
stone dock and waterfront area with wooden posts extending into the water
ornate black iron street lamp with hanging flower baskets
fog-covered mountain visible across the water

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a foggy waterfront promenade with historic stone buildings on the left and a dock visible on the right. At around 9 seconds, he begins ascending a curved stone staircase to reach an upper terrace level, passing decorative iron lampposts along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated terrace walkway with stone balustrades

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated terrace with stone railings, passing potted trees and other pedestrians

entered.detail: stone balustrade with decorative pillars overlooking the lower level
large potted trees in stone planters lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: On the upper terrace, Geralt walks past stone balustrades and potted trees. The historic stone building remains visible on the left while the waterfront recedes from view. Other pedestrians walk in the opposite direction along the fog-shrouded path.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined garden path with iron fencing

agents.ego_description: walking through a garden path shaded by dense trees and flowering bushes

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress sitting on wooden bench

entered.detail: black iron fence with pointed spikes running along the right side of the path
dense bushes with bright red flowers in stone planters
bush with purple flowers near the stone building wall
wooden park bench with metal armrests

segments.scene_description: The path becomes more enclosed as Geralt walks through a garden area with an iron spike fence on the right and dense tree canopy overhead. Red and purple flowering bushes line the cobblestone path, and a woman sits on a wooden bench to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: manor house entrance hall and courtyard

events.description: enters the manor house through wooden doorway, transitioning from outdoor cobblestone to indoor stone flooring
exits through the back of the building into an outdoor courtyard area

agents.ego_description: approaching the manor entrance, entering through the doorway, and passing through to the courtyard

entered.detail: grand stone building entrance with steps leading up to wooden doors
fluted stone columns framing the entrance doorway
dark wooden double doors with metal studs and handles
dimly lit interior space with wooden paneling and furniture visible briefly

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches a grand manor house entrance flanked by stone columns and potted red flowers. He enters through the wooden doorway into a dimly lit interior space with marble flooring, then exits through the back into a courtyard area.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sunlit alley with half-timbered medieval buildings

events.description: emerges from shadow into direct sunlight, dramatically brightening the scene from foggy grey to warm gold

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow sunlit alley with timber-framed buildings, passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing against the stone wall
woman in dark dress walking toward the camera

entered.detail: traditional medieval building with exposed wooden beams and plaster walls
multi-story house with dark wooden timber framing and white plaster

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the building, Geralt enters a narrow alley illuminated by bright sunlight breaking through the fog. Half-timbered medieval buildings line the cobblestone street as pedestrians walk in opposing directions, including an armored guard and a woman in a dress.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy medieval waterfront that gradually transitions into a sunlit urban alley. It begins with Geralt walking along a misty promenade beside historic stone buildings before he ascends a curved stone staircase past decorative iron lampposts to reach an upper terrace. As he moves across this elevated level past stone balustrades and pedestrians, the waterfront recedes and the path becomes more enclosed, shifting into a garden area shaded by a dense tree canopy and lined with flowering bushes. The camera then follows him through the grand, columned entrance of a manor house and across a dimly lit marble interior before he exits through the back. Finally, the scene opens into a narrow cobblestone alley where the fog breaks to reveal bright sunlight illuminating half-timbered buildings and passing townspeople.
